name: Kings Arms Tavern Cream of Peanut Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Mince the onion and chop the celery.
2. In a large pot, melt the butter over medium heat. Add the minced onion and chopped celery. Cook until the vegetables are soft but not browned.
3. Stir in the flour, whisking constantly to prevent lumps. Cook for 1-2 minutes until well blended.
4. Gradually add the chicken stock or broth, stirring constantly to avoid lumps. Bring the mixture to a boil and then reduce the heat to low.
5. Remove from heat and transfer the mixture to a blender. Blend until smooth.
6. Add the smooth peanut butter and light cream. Stir thoroughly to combine.
7. Return the blended soup to the pot and stir well. Cook over low heat for a few minutes, ensuring it is heated through but not boiling.
